app.title: FIFA Ranking
app.tagline: Play the FIFA World Cup 2026 knockout bracket. Predict, share, and follow live results.

disclaimer.body: Fan-built with a lot of AI help, powered by free public APIs — so bugs and stale scores happen.

storyline.beat2: The knockout, redrawn as a ring — 32 survivors on the outside, one trophy at the center.
storyline.beat3: Every flag the same distance from glory. No seeds. No favorites. No invisible order.
storyline.beat4: A left-to-right bracket writes the ending before kickoff.
storyline.beat5: The circle refuses to spoil the story.
storyline.beat6: When the whistle blows, no one owns the next ninety minutes. Anyone can beat anyone.
storyline.beat7: The traditional bracket is dead. Welcome to the wheel of destiny. Scroll to predict.
storyline.creditSuffix: . Everything else, decided on the pitch.

bracket.title: Knockout Bracket
bracket.tagline: Click any team to see their tournament journey.

replay.tagline: Watch the knockout unfold in the order matches were played.

interactive.tagline: Pick your winners — click a team to advance them.
interactive.hint: Tap or click a team to advance them. Change a pick and downstream ones reset.

pickToast.advance: Bold choice! You sent {{team}} through to the {{round}}.
pickToast.crowned: Bold choice! You just crowned {{team}} champion.

historical.title: Past World Cups
historical.subtitle: The knockout matches from previous editions — data scraped from Wikipedia.

groups.title: Group Stage
groups.subtitle: 12 groups × 4 teams. Top 2 and the 8 best third-placed teams advanced to the Round of 32.
